```css
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 400px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 35px 25px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 20px 0;
    padding: 15px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 15px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 400px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 35px 25px;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
    box-shadow: 0 8px 30px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 30px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 8px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 20px 0;
    padding: 15px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 15px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page
let lastScrollTop = 0;
let scrollTimeout = null;

function handleScroll() {
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (!invitationPage || !invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        return;
    }
    
    const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    
    // Clear existing timeout
    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }
    
    // If scrolling up and at the top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop < 50) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Only go back if still at top after a short delay
            if (window.pageYOffset < 50) {
                goBack();
            }
        }, 300);
    }
    
    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}
```

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible

    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```


Adding a body attribute to disable translation:


```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="bn" translate="no">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">

    <title>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ আমন্ত্রণ | Prithis & Priti Wedding Invitation</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Bengali:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body translate="no">
    <!-- Landing Page (First Page) -->
    <div id="landing-page" class="page active">
        <div class="landing-container">

            <div class="corner-decoration top-left"></div>

                    </div>

                        <p class="invited-text-english">INVITATION</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bride and Groom Logo Section -->

                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Middle Section - Names -->
                <div class="landing-names-section">
                    <div class="name-box name-box-left">
                        <h1 class="landing-name">প্রীতি</h1>
                        <p class="english-name">Priti</p>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="union-heart">❤</div>
                    
                    <div class="name-box name-box-right">
                        <h1 class="landing-name">পৃথ্বীশ</h1>
                        <p class="english-name">Prithis</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bottom Section -->
                <div class="landing-bottom-section">
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                    <p class="subtitle-text">আমাদের বিবাহে আপনাকে আমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We invite you to our wedding</span></p>
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                </div>
            </div>
            
            <!-- Open Button -->
            <button class="open-button" onclick="openInvitation()">
                <span class="button-text-bengali">আমন্ত্রণ দেখুন</span>
                <span class="button-text-english">VIEW INVITATION</span>
                <span class="button-arrow">→</span>
            </button>
            
            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="footer-text">
                <p>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ<br><span class="english-text">Prithis & Priti Wedding</span></p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Invitation Page (Second Page) -->
    <div id="invitation-page" class="page">
        <div class="container">
            <!-- Countdown Section -->
            <section class="countdown-section">
                <h2 class="countdown-title">বিবাহ পর্যন্ত / Time Until Wedding</h2>
                <div class="countdown-container">
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="days">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">দিন / Days</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="hours">00</div>

                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">

                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="seconds">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">সেকেন্ড / Seconds</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Calendar Section -->
            <section class="calendar-section">
                <h2 class="calendar-title">মে ২০২৬ / May 2026</h2>
                <div class="calendar">
                    <div class="calendar-header">
                        <div class="day-name">রবি<br>Sun</div>
                        <div class="day-name">সোম<br>Mon</div>
                        <div class="day-name">মঙ্গল<br>Tue</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বুধ<br>Wed</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বৃহ<br>Thu</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শুক্র<br>Fri</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শনি<br>Sat</div>

                    <div class="calendar-grid" id="calendar-grid">
                        <!-- Calendar days will be generated by JavaScript -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Header Section with Ganesha -->
            <header class="header">
                <div class="ganesha-icon-container">
                    <img src="Assets/ganesh_logo.png" alt="Ganesh" class="ganesha-icon-img">
                </div>

                <p class="subtitle">মঙ্গল আমন্ত্রণ<br><span class="english-text">Auspicious Invitation</span></p>
            </header>

            <!-- Main Invitation Section -->
            <section class="invitation-section">

                    <p class="invitation-text">আমাদের কন্যার শুভ পরিণয় উপলক্ষে<br>আপনাদের সপরিবারে নিমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We cordially invite you and your family<br>to the auspicious wedding of our daughter</span></p>
                    
                    <div class="couple-names">
                        <div class="name-bride">
                            <h2 class="name-large">প্রীতি<br><span class="english-name">Priti</span></h2>

                            <p class="parent-names">সুকান্ত ও শেফালী অধিকারী<br><span class="english-text">Sukanto & Shefali Adhikari</span></p>
                        </div>

                        <div class="name-groom">

                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">

                            <span class="detail-value">রামপুর বি.বি.টি. রোড,<br>ফ্ল্যাট- মাধুরী অ্যাপার্টমেন্ট,<br>পিলার নং ৭০<br><span class="english-text">Rampur B.B.T. Road,<br>Flat - Madhuri Apartment,<br>Pillar No. 70</span></span>
                        </div>

            <!-- RSVP Section -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">✉️</span><span class="sh-title">RSVP</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>

                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Name · আপনার নাম</label><input type="text" id="r-name" placeholder="নাম লিখুন"></div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Guests · কতজন</label>

                            <option>৪+ জন · Four or more</option>
                        </select>

                    <div class="fl"><label>Will You Be There?</label>
                        <select id="r-attend">

                            <option>দুঃখিত, পারব না · Regretfully unable</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Wishes · আশীর্বাদ</label><textarea id="r-wish" placeholder="শুভকামনা লিখুন..."></textarea></div>
                    <button class="rbtn" onclick="sendRSVP()">Send RSVP · পাঠান</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- BLESSINGS -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">🙏</span><span class="sh-title">Blessings</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <div class="sb" id="wishes-wall">
                    <div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="footer">
                <span class="footer-om">🕉️</span>
                <div class="footer-names">Priti & Prithis</div>
                <div class="footer-date">১৩ মে · May 13, 2026</div>
                <div class="footer-div"></div>
                <div class="footer-note">আপনার আশীর্বাদ আমাদের সবচেয়ে বড় উপহার</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <script src="https://cdn.rawgit.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs/gh-pages/qrcode.min.js"></script>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```


## Summary of Changes

1. Disabled browser translation
   - Added `translate="no"` to `<html>` and `<body>`
   - Added meta tags: `google="notranslate"` and `google-translate-customization="no"`

2. Removed back button and added scroll-up detection
   - Removed the back button from the invitation page
   - Added scroll detection: scrolling up near the top (within 50px) returns to the first page
   - Includes a short delay to avoid accidental triggers

3. Made map section clickable
   - The entire QR code/map section is clickable
   - Clicking opens the Google Maps location in a new tab
   - Added hover effects for visual feedback

4. Added combined bride & groom logo
   - Replaced individual bride and groom logos with `bride_grrom_logo.png`
   - Updated animation to a fade-in and scale effect
   - Logo box size set to 200x200px

All changes are complete. The page now:
- Prevents browser translation
- Returns to the first page when scrolling up at the top
- Opens the map location when clicking the map/QR section
- Displays the combined bride and groom logo with animation

Improving the design with better spacing, styling, and visual polish:


```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}
```
