    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 40px 30px;
    margin-bottom: 35px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 10px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    gap: 12px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 40px 30px;
    margin-bottom: 35px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 10px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    gap: 12px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 40px 30px;
    margin-bottom: 35px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 10px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    gap: 12px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 25px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 30px;
    padding: 15px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 8px;
    min-width: 55px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 24px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 4px;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 9px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 20px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin: 0 3px;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 15px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Mobile-only design - hide on desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    body::after {
        content: 'This website is optimized for mobile devices only. Please view on a mobile device.';
        position: fixed;
        top: 50%;
        left: 50%;
        transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
        background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.8);
        color: #FFFFFF;
        padding: 20px;
        border-radius: 10px;
        z-index: 10000;
        text-align: center;
        font-size: 16px;
    }
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 20px;
    left: 20px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 20px;
    right: 20px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 40px 30px;
    margin-bottom: 35px;
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: float 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 10px;
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 25px 0;
    gap: 12px;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 28px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    flex-shrink: 0;
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 20px;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
