```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="bn" translate="no">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
    <meta name="google-translate-customization" content="no">
    <title>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ আমন্ত্রণ | Prithis & Priti Wedding Invitation</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Bengali:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body translate="no">
    <!-- Landing Page (First Page) -->
    <div id="landing-page" class="page active">
        <div class="landing-container">
            <!-- Decorative Corner Elements -->
            <div class="corner-decoration top-left"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration top-right"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration bottom-left"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration bottom-right"></div>
            
            <!-- Main Content Box -->
            <div class="landing-main-box">
                <!-- Top Section -->
                <div class="landing-top-section">
                    <div class="ganesh-logo-container">
                        <img src="Assets/ganesh_logo.png" alt="Ganesh" class="ganesh-logo">
                    </div>
                    <div class="invitation-badge">
                        <p class="invited-text-bengali">আমন্ত্রণ</p>
                        <p class="invited-text-english">INVITATION</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bride and Groom Logo Section -->
                <div class="bride-groom-logos">
                    <div class="logo-box combined-logo-box">
                        <img src="Assets/bride_grrom_logo.png" alt="Bride & Groom" class="combined-logo">
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Heart Icon -->
                <div class="union-heart-container">
                    <div class="union-heart">❤</div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Middle Section - Names -->
                <div class="landing-names-section">
                    <div class="name-box name-box-left">
                        <h1 class="landing-name">প্রীতি</h1>
                        <p class="english-name">Priti</p>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="name-box name-box-right">
                        <h1 class="landing-name">পৃথ্বীশ</h1>
                        <p class="english-name">Prithis</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bottom Section -->
                <div class="landing-bottom-section">
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                    <p class="subtitle-text">আমাদের বিবাহে আপনাকে আমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We invite you to our wedding</span></p>
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                </div>
                
               
                    
                    <!-- Open Button -->
                    <button class="open-button" onclick="openInvitation()">
                        <span class="button-text-bengali">আমন্ত্রণ দেখুন</span>
                        <span class="button-text-english">VIEW INVITATION</span>
                        <span class="button-arrow">→</span>
                    </button>
                    
                    <!-- Footer Section -->
                    <div class="footer-text">
                        <p>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ<br><span class="english-text">Prithis & Priti Wedding</span></p>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Invitation Page (Second Page) -->
    <div id="invitation-page" class="page">
        <div class="container">
            <!-- Header Section with Ganesha -->
            <header class="header">
                <div class="ganesha-icon-container">
                    <img src="Assets/ganesh_logo.png" alt="Ganesh" class="ganesha-icon-img">
                </div>
                <h1 class="invocation">ওঁ শ্রী গণেশায় নমঃ<br><span class="english-text">Om Shri Ganeshaya Namah</span></h1>
                <p class="subtitle">মঙ্গল আমন্ত্রণ<br><span class="english-text">Auspicious Invitation</span></p>
            </header>

            <!-- Bride and Groom Images Section -->
            <section class="couple-images-section">
                <div class="couple-images-container">
                    <div class="couple-image-box bride-image-box">
                        <img src="Assets/bride_logo.png" alt="Bride" class="couple-image">
                    </div>
                    <div class="couple-image-box groom-image-box">
                        <img src="Assets/grrom_logo.png" alt="Groom" class="couple-image">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Main Invitation Section -->
            <section class="invitation-section">
                <div class="decorative-top"></div>
                
                <div class="main-content">
                    <p class="invitation-text">আমাদের কন্যার শুভ পরিণয় উপলক্ষে<br>আপনাদের সপরিবারে নিমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We cordially invite you and your family<br>to the auspicious wedding of our daughter</span></p>
                    
                    <div class="couple-names">
                        <div class="name-bride">
                            <h2 class="name-large">প্রীতি<br><span class="english-name">Priti</span></h2>
                            <p class="parent-info">কন্যা / Daughter</p>
                            <p class="parent-names">সুকান্ত ও শেফালী অধিকারী<br><span class="english-text">Sukanto & Shefali Adhikari</span></p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="union-symbol">&</div>
                        
                        <div class="name-groom">
                            <h2 class="name-large">পৃথ্বীশ<br><span class="english-name">Prithis</span></h2>
                            <p class="parent-info">পুত্র / Son</p>
                            <p class="parent-names">নান্টু ও পলি মন্ডল<br><span class="english-text">Nantu & Poli Mondal</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="wedding-details">
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">বিবাহের শুভদিন / Wedding Date:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">১৩ মে, ২০২৬<br><span class="english-text">May 13, 2026</span></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">সময় / Time:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">রাত্রি ১১:২৪<br><span class="english-text">11:24 PM</span></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">স্থান / Venue:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">রামপুর বি.বি.টি. রোড,<br>ফ্ল্যাট- মাধুরী অ্যাপার্টমেন্ট,<br>পিলার নং ৭০<br><span class="english-text">Rampur B.B.T. Road,<br>Flat - Madhuri Apartment,<br>Pillar No. 70</span></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="host-info">
                        <p class="host-text">আমন্ত্রণে / Invited by:</p>
                        <p class="host-names">সুকান্ত ও শেফালী অধিকারী<br><span class="english-text">Sukanto & Shefali Adhikari</span></p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="decorative-bottom"></div>
            </section>

            <!-- Countdown Section -->
            <section class="countdown-section">
                <h2 class="countdown-title">বিবাহ পর্যন্ত / Time Until Wedding</h2>
                <div class="countdown-container">
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="days">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">দিন<br>Days</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="hours">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">ঘন্টা<br>Hours</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="minutes">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">মিনিট<br>Minutes</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="seconds">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">সেকেন্ড<br>Seconds</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Calendar Section -->
            <section class="calendar-section">
                <h2 class="calendar-title">মে ২০২৬ / May 2026</h2>
                <div class="calendar">
                    <div class="calendar-header">
                        <div class="day-name">রবি<br>Sun</div>
                        <div class="day-name">সোম<br>Mon</div>
                        <div class="day-name">মঙ্গল<br>Tue</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বুধ<br>Wed</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বৃহ<br>Thu</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শুক্র<br>Fri</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শনি<br>Sat</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="calendar-grid" id="calendar-grid">
                        <!-- Calendar days will be generated by JavaScript -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Map QR Code Section -->
            <section class="qr-section">
                <div class="qr-container" onclick="openMapLocation()" style="cursor: pointer;">
                    <div class="qr-placeholder" id="map-qr-code">
                        <div class="qr-icon">📍</div>
                        <p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>
                    </div>
                    <p class="scan-text">ঠিকানার জন্য স্ক্যান করুন<br><span class="english-text">Scan for Location</span></p>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- RSVP Section -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">✉️</span><span class="sh-title">RSVP</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <div class="rsvpinner">
                    <div class="rtitle">আপনার উত্তর দিন</div>
                    <p class="rsub">আমাদের বিশেষ দিনে আপনার উপস্থিতি নিশ্চিত করুন।<br>Kindly confirm your attendance.</p>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Name · আপনার নাম</label><input type="text" id="r-name" placeholder="নাম লিখুন"></div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Guests · কতজন</label>
                        <select id="r-guests">
                            <option>১ জন · Just me</option>
                            <option>২ জন · Two</option>
                            <option>৩ জন · Three</option>
                            <option>৪+ জন · Four or more</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Will You Be There?</label>
                        <select id="r-attend">
                            <option>হ্যাঁ, অবশ্যই · Joyfully attending</option>
                            <option>সম্ভবত · Maybe attending</option>
                            <option>দুঃখিত, পারব না · Regretfully unable</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Wishes · আশীর্বাদ</label><textarea id="r-wish" placeholder="শুভকামনা লিখুন..."></textarea></div>
                    <button class="rbtn" onclick="sendRSVP()">Send RSVP · পাঠান</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- BLESSINGS -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">🙏</span><span class="sh-title">Blessings</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <div class="sb" id="wishes-wall">
                    <div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="footer">
                <span class="footer-om">🕉️</span>
                <div class="footer-names">Priti & Prithis</div>
                <div class="footer-date">১৩ মে · May 13, 2026</div>
                <div class="footer-div"></div>
                <div class="footer-note">আপনার আশীর্বাদ আমাদের সবচেয়ে বড় উপহার</div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Background Music -->
    <audio id="background-music" loop>
        <source src="ReelAudio-43395.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
        Your browser does not support the audio element.
    </audio>

    <script src="https://cdn.rawgit.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs/gh-pages/qrcode.min.js"></script>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Play background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.volume = 0.5; // Set volume to 50%
        backgroundMusic.play().catch(error => {
            // Handle autoplay restrictions - user interaction may be required
            console.log('Audio autoplay prevented:', error);
        });
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page
let lastScrollTop = 0;
let scrollTimeout = null;

function handleScroll() {
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (!invitationPage || !invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        return;
    }
    
    const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    
    // Clear existing timeout
    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }
    
    // If scrolling up and at the top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop < 50) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Only go back if still at top after a short delay
            if (window.pageYOffset < 50) {
                goBack();
            }
        }, 300);
    }
    
    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Play background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.volume = 0.5; // Set volume to 50%
        backgroundMusic.play().catch(error => {
            // Handle autoplay restrictions - user interaction may be required
            console.log('Audio autoplay prevented:', error);
        });
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Pause background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.pause();
        backgroundMusic.currentTime = 0; // Reset to beginning
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer

function startCountdown() {

    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {

        if (distance < 0) {

            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');

        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;

    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();

    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {

    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');

        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page

let scrollTimeout = null;

}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page

    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {

                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {

        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```


Added background music that plays when the invitation page opens.

## Changes Made:

1. **Added Audio Element** in `index.html`:
   - Added an `<audio>` element with `loop` so the music repeats
   - Set the source to `ReelAudio-43395.mp3`

2. **Updated `openInvitation()` function** in `script.js`:
   - Plays the background music when the invitation page opens
   - Sets volume to 50%
   - Includes error handling for autoplay restrictions

3. **Updated `goBack()` function** in `script.js`:
   - Pauses the music when returning to the landing page
   - Resets the audio to the beginning

When users click "VIEW INVITATION", the music starts playing and loops. When they scroll back to the landing page, the music pauses.

Note: Ensure `ReelAudio-43395.mp3` is in the same directory as `index.html`. If it's in a different folder (e.g., `Assets/`), I can update the path.

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 20px 0;

}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 25px 30px;
    /* margin-bottom: 35px; */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 20px 0 15px 0;
    padding: 10px; */
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 15px 0 20px 0; */
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 10px 0 15px 0; */
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.3));
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 15px;
    /* padding-top: 10px; */
    width: 100%;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    /* margin-top: 25px; */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    text-align: center;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 30px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 0%, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 8px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 15px 10px;
    min-width: 65px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.countdown-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 2px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: -11px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Couple Images Section */
/* .couple-images-section {
     margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 20px 0; 
} */

.couple-images-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.couple-image-box {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.couple-image-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.35);
}

.bride-image-box {
    animation: slideInLeft 1s ease-out;
}

.groom-image-box {
    animation: slideInRight 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 9px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Responsive design - works on both mobile and desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    /* Removed mobile-only popup - website now works on desktop too */
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```


Removed the popup. A CSS media query was showing a "mobile-only" message on desktop screens (768px and wider).

## What I did:
- Removed the `body::after` pseudo-element that displayed the popup message
- The website now works on both mobile and desktop without the popup

The popup should no longer appear. The invitation page will display normally on desktop and mobile. Refresh the page to see the change.

---

**User**

In the guest dropdown is not adjustable you can see that when i open it from phone then you can see it out of the phone 

---

**Cursor**


Checking the CSS for the Guests dropdown to ensure it stays within the viewport on mobile:



Fixing the dropdown overflow on mobile. Native `<select>` dropdowns can extend beyond the viewport. Adding CSS to contain it:



Adding CSS to keep the dropdown within the viewport on mobile:


```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overflow-y: auto;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 20px 0;

}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 25px 30px;
    /* margin-bottom: 35px; */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 20px 0 15px 0;
    padding: 10px; */
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 15px 0 20px 0; */
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 10px 0 15px 0; */
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.3));
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 15px;
    /* padding-top: 10px; */
    width: 100%;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    /* margin-top: 25px; */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    text-align: center;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 30px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 0%, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 15px 10px;
    min-width: 65px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.countdown-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 2px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: -11px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Couple Images Section */
/* .couple-images-section {
     margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 20px 0; 
} */

.couple-images-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.couple-image-box {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.couple-image-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.35);
}

.bride-image-box {
    animation: slideInLeft 1s ease-out;
}

.groom-image-box {
    animation: slideInRight 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 9px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Responsive design - works on both mobile and desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    /* Removed mobile-only popup - website now works on desktop too */
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overflow-y: auto;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}
```
