**Cursor**


The scroll handler is triggering when the dropdown opens. Updating it to ignore interactions with select dropdowns:



Updating the scroll handler to ignore scroll events when a select dropdown is open:


```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Handle select dropdowns on mobile
    setTimeout(handleSelectDropdown, 100);
    
    // Play background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.volume = 0.5; // Set volume to 50%
        backgroundMusic.play().catch(error => {
            // Handle autoplay restrictions - user interaction may be required
            console.log('Audio autoplay prevented:', error);
        });
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Pause background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.pause();
        backgroundMusic.currentTime = 0; // Reset to beginning
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page
let lastScrollTop = 0;
let scrollTimeout = null;
let isSelectOpen = false;

function handleScroll() {
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (!invitationPage || !invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Don't trigger goBack if a select dropdown is open
    if (isSelectOpen) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Check if any select is currently focused
    const activeElement = document.activeElement;
    if (activeElement && activeElement.tagName === 'SELECT') {
        return;
    }
    
    const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;
    
    // Clear existing timeout
    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }
    
    // If scrolling up and at the top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop < 50) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Only go back if still at top after a short delay and no select is open
            if (window.pageYOffset < 50 && !isSelectOpen) {
                const activeEl = document.activeElement;
                if (!activeEl || activeEl.tagName !== 'SELECT') {
                    goBack();
                }
            }
        }, 300);
    }
    
    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Handle select dropdown on mobile to prevent overflow
function handleSelectDropdown() {
    const selects = document.querySelectorAll('.fl select');
    
    selects.forEach(select => {
        select.addEventListener('focus', function() {
            // Scroll the select into view when it's focused
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center', inline: 'nearest' });
            }, 300);
            
            // Add class to body to prevent page scrolling
            if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {
                document.body.classList.add('select-open');
            }
        });
        
        select.addEventListener('blur', function() {
            // Remove class when select loses focus
            document.body.classList.remove('select-open');
        });
        
        select.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Ensure select stays in view after selection
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center', inline: 'nearest' });
            }, 100);
        });
    });
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Handle select dropdowns on mobile
    handleSelectDropdown();
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```

```javascript
function handleScroll() {

    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }
    
    // If scrolling up and at the top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop < 50) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Only go back if still at top after a short delay and no select is open
            if (window.pageYOffset < 50 && !isSelectOpen) {
                const activeEl = document.activeElement;
                if (!activeEl || activeEl.tagName !== 'SELECT') {
                    goBack();
                }
            }
        }, 300);
    }
    
    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Handle select dropdown on mobile to prevent overflow
function handleSelectDropdown() {
    const selects = document.querySelectorAll('.fl select');
    
    selects.forEach(select => {
        select.addEventListener('focus', function() {
            isSelectOpen = true;
            
            // Scroll the select into view when it's focused
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center', inline: 'nearest' });
            }, 300);
            
            // Add class to body to prevent page scrolling
            if (window.innerWidth <= 767) {
                document.body.classList.add('select-open');
            }
        });
        
        select.addEventListener('blur', function() {
            // Remove class when select loses focus
            document.body.classList.remove('select-open');
            // Delay resetting flag to allow dropdown to close
            setTimeout(() => {
                isSelectOpen = false;
            }, 200);
        });
        
        select.addEventListener('change', function() {
            // Ensure select stays in view after selection
            setTimeout(() => {
                this.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center', inline: 'nearest' });
            }, 100);
        });
        
        // Also handle mousedown/touchstart to catch when dropdown opens
        select.addEventListener('mousedown', function() {
            isSelectOpen = true;
        });
        
        select.addEventListener('touchstart', function() {
            isSelectOpen = true;
        });
    });
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Handle select dropdowns on mobile
    handleSelectDropdown();
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```


Fixed the issue: clicking the dropdown was triggering the scroll handler and navigating back. Changes:

## Changes Made:

1. **Added `isSelectOpen` flag** — Tracks when a select dropdown is open.

2. **Updated `handleScroll()` function** — Now checks:
   - If a select dropdown is currently open (`isSelectOpen`)
   - If the active element is a `<select>` element
   - Only triggers `goBack()` if neither condition is true

3. **Updated `handleSelectDropdown()` function** — Now:
   - Sets `isSelectOpen = true` when a select is focused, clicked, or touched
   - Clears the flag when the select loses focus (with a small delay to allow the dropdown to close)
   - Prevents the scroll handler from interfering with dropdown interactions

When you click the dropdown:
- It opens normally
- The page won't navigate back to the first page
- You can select an option without issues
- The scroll-to-top feature still works when you're not interacting with dropdowns

The dropdown should now work without triggering the back navigation.

---

**User**

No not fixed I want that dropdown  when i click on that drop down page then do want to blick just open that drop dorpdown in responsive page and adjustable way 

---

**Cursor**

The scroll-back mechanism is too aggressive and interferes with form interactions. Let me completely rewrite the approach — disable scroll-back when interacting with ANY form element, and make it much less sensitive:

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Handle select dropdowns on mobile
    setTimeout(handleSelectDropdown, 100);
    
    // Play background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.volume = 0.5; // Set volume to 50%
        backgroundMusic.play().catch(error => {
            // Handle autoplay restrictions - user interaction may be required
            console.log('Audio autoplay prevented:', error);
        });
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Pause background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.pause();
        backgroundMusic.currentTime = 0; // Reset to beginning
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page
let lastScrollTop = 0;
let scrollTimeout = null;
let formInteracting = false;
let formCooldown = null;

// Track ALL form element interactions to prevent scroll-back
function setupFormProtection() {
    // Listen on all form elements: input, select, textarea, button inside RSVP
    document.addEventListener('focusin', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON') {
            formInteracting = true;
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
        }
    });

    document.addEventListener('focusout', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON') {
            // Keep protection for 1 second after losing focus
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
            formCooldown = setTimeout(() => {
                formInteracting = false;
            }, 1000);
        }
    });

    // Also catch touch/click on form elements
    document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON' || tag === 'OPTION' || tag === 'LABEL') {
            formInteracting = true;
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
            formCooldown = setTimeout(() => {
                formInteracting = false;
            }, 2000);
        }
    }, { passive: true });
}

function handleScroll() {
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (!invitationPage || !invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        return;
    }

    // NEVER go back if user is interacting with form elements
    if (formInteracting) {
        return;
    }

    const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

    // Clear existing timeout
    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }

    // If scrolling up and at the very top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop === 0) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Triple-check: at top, not interacting with form, no focused form element
            if (window.pageYOffset === 0 && !formInteracting) {
                const active = document.activeElement;
                const tag = active ? active.tagName : '';
                if (tag !== 'SELECT' && tag !== 'INPUT' && tag !== 'TEXTAREA') {
                    goBack();
                }
            }
        }, 500);
    }

    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Handle select dropdowns on mobile
    handleSelectDropdown();
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;

    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');

    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,

        wish: wish,

    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });

}

        return;

    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';

        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}
```

```javascript
// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {

    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();

    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

// Scroll detection to go back to first page
let lastScrollTop = 0;
let scrollTimeout = null;
let formInteracting = false;
let formCooldown = null;

// Track ALL form element interactions to prevent scroll-back
function setupFormProtection() {
    // Listen on all form elements: input, select, textarea, button inside RSVP
    document.addEventListener('focusin', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON') {
            formInteracting = true;
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
        }
    });

    document.addEventListener('focusout', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON') {
            // Keep protection for 1 second after losing focus
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
            formCooldown = setTimeout(() => {
                formInteracting = false;
            }, 1000);
        }
    });

    // Also catch touch/click on form elements
    document.addEventListener('touchstart', function(e) {
        const tag = e.target.tagName;
        if (tag === 'SELECT' || tag === 'INPUT' || tag === 'TEXTAREA' || tag === 'BUTTON' || tag === 'OPTION' || tag === 'LABEL') {
            formInteracting = true;
            if (formCooldown) clearTimeout(formCooldown);
            formCooldown = setTimeout(() => {
                formInteracting = false;
            }, 2000);
        }
    }, { passive: true });
}

function handleScroll() {
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (!invitationPage || !invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        return;
    }

    // NEVER go back if user is interacting with form elements
    if (formInteracting) {
        return;
    }

    const currentScrollTop = window.pageYOffset || document.documentElement.scrollTop;

    // Clear existing timeout
    if (scrollTimeout) {
        clearTimeout(scrollTimeout);
    }

    // If scrolling up and at the very top of the page
    if (currentScrollTop < lastScrollTop && currentScrollTop === 0) {
        scrollTimeout = setTimeout(() => {
            // Triple-check: at top, not interacting with form, no focused form element
            if (window.pageYOffset === 0 && !formInteracting) {
                const active = document.activeElement;
                const tag = active ? active.tagName : '';
                if (tag !== 'SELECT' && tag !== 'INPUT' && tag !== 'TEXTAREA') {
                    goBack();
                }
            }
        }, 500);
    }

    lastScrollTop = currentScrollTop <= 0 ? 0 : currentScrollTop;
}

// Initialize on page load
document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', function() {
    // Initialize calendar if on invitation page
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    if (invitationPage && invitationPage.classList.contains('active')) {
        startCountdown();
        generateCalendar();
        generateMapQRCode();
        loadBlessings();
    }
    
    // Setup form protection to prevent scroll-back during form interactions
    setupFormProtection();
    
    // Add scroll listener for going back to first page
    window.addEventListener('scroll', handleScroll, { passive: true });

    // Add subtle animation on scroll
    const observerOptions = {
        threshold: 0.1,
        rootMargin: '0px 0px -50px 0px'
    };

    const observer = new IntersectionObserver(function(entries) {
        entries.forEach(entry => {
            if (entry.isIntersecting) {
                entry.target.style.opacity = '1';
                entry.target.style.transform = 'translateY(0)';
            }
        });
    }, observerOptions);

    // Observe elements for animation
    document.querySelectorAll('.main-content, .qr-section, .countdown-section, .calendar-section, .sec').forEach(el => {
        el.style.opacity = '0';
        el.style.transform = 'translateY(20px)';
        el.style.transition = 'opacity 0.6s ease, transform 0.6s ease';
        observer.observe(el);
    });
});

// Generate QR Code for Map Location
function generateMapQRCode() {
    const qrContainer = document.getElementById('map-qr-code');
    if (!qrContainer) return;
    
    // Clear existing content
    qrContainer.innerHTML = '';
    
    // Google Maps URL
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    
    // Generate QR code using QRCode library
    if (typeof QRCode !== 'undefined') {
        try {
            new QRCode(qrContainer, {
                text: mapUrl,
                width: 130,
                height: 130,
                colorDark: '#8B4513',
                colorLight: '#FFFFFF',
                correctLevel: QRCode.CorrectLevel.H
            });
        } catch (error) {
            console.error('QR Code generation error:', error);
            // Fallback to placeholder
            qrContainer.innerHTML = '<div class="qr-icon">📍</div><p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>';
        }
    } else {
        // Retry if library not loaded yet
        setTimeout(generateMapQRCode, 500);
    }
}

// RSVP Functionality
function sendRSVP() {
    const name = document.getElementById('r-name').value.trim();
    const guests = document.getElementById('r-guests').value;
    const attend = document.getElementById('r-attend').value;
    const wish = document.getElementById('r-wish').value.trim();
    
    if (!name) {
        alert('Please enter your name / অনুগ্রহ করে আপনার নাম লিখুন');
        return;
    }
    
    // Create RSVP data object
    const rsvpData = {
        name: name,
        guests: guests,
        attendance: attend,
        wish: wish,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    };
    
    // Store in localStorage (in a real app, you'd send this to a server)
    let rsvps = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingRSVPs') || '[]');
    rsvps.push(rsvpData);
    localStorage.setItem('weddingRSVPs', JSON.stringify(rsvps));
    
    // Add blessing if provided
    if (wish) {
        addBlessing(name, wish);
    }
    
    // Clear form
    document.getElementById('r-name').value = '';
    document.getElementById('r-guests').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-attend').selectedIndex = 0;
    document.getElementById('r-wish').value = '';
    
    // Show success message
    alert('Thank you for your RSVP! / আপনার উত্তর দেওয়ার জন্য ধন্যবাদ!');
}

// Blessings Management
function addBlessing(name, message) {
    let blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    blessings.push({
        name: name,
        message: message,
        timestamp: new Date().toISOString()
    });
    localStorage.setItem('weddingBlessings', JSON.stringify(blessings));
    displayBlessings();
}

function loadBlessings() {
    displayBlessings();
}

function displayBlessings() {
    const wishesWall = document.getElementById('wishes-wall');
    if (!wishesWall) return;
    
    const blessings = JSON.parse(localStorage.getItem('weddingBlessings') || '[]');
    
    if (blessings.length === 0) {
        wishesWall.innerHTML = '<div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>';
        return;
    }
    
    wishesWall.innerHTML = '';
    blessings.forEach(blessing => {
        const wishItem = document.createElement('div');
        wishItem.className = 'wish-item';
        wishItem.innerHTML = `
            <div class="wish-name">${escapeHtml(blessing.name)}</div>
            <div class="wish-message">${escapeHtml(blessing.message)}</div>
        `;
        wishesWall.appendChild(wishItem);
    });
}

function escapeHtml(text) {
    const div = document.createElement('div');
    div.textContent = text;
    return div.innerHTML;
}

```

Also remove the old `handleSelectDropdown` call from `openInvitation`:

```javascript
// Wedding date: May 13, 2026 at 11:24 PM
const weddingDate = new Date('2026-05-13T23:24:00');

// Page navigation - show invitation page but keep landing page accessible
function openInvitation() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    landingPage.classList.remove('active');
    invitationPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Reset scroll tracking
    lastScrollTop = 0;
    
    // Start countdown when page opens
    startCountdown();
    generateCalendar();
    generateMapQRCode();
    loadBlessings();
    
    // Play background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.volume = 0.5; // Set volume to 50%
        backgroundMusic.play().catch(error => {
            // Handle autoplay restrictions - user interaction may be required
            console.log('Audio autoplay prevented:', error);
        });
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Go back to landing page
function goBack() {
    const landingPage = document.getElementById('landing-page');
    const invitationPage = document.getElementById('invitation-page');
    
    invitationPage.classList.remove('active');
    landingPage.classList.add('active');
    
    // Pause background music
    const backgroundMusic = document.getElementById('background-music');
    if (backgroundMusic) {
        backgroundMusic.pause();
        backgroundMusic.currentTime = 0; // Reset to beginning
    }
    
    // Scroll to top
    window.scrollTo(0, 0);
}

// Open map location
function openMapLocation() {
    const mapUrl = 'https://www.google.com/maps/place/Nazrul+Mancha/@22.5133504,88.3441575,15z/data=!3m1!4b1!4m6!3m5!1s0x3a027715fa70c4c5:0x9defaebf49454c3d!8m2!3d22.5133316!4d88.3626116!16s%2Fm%2F0gmd99l?entry=ttu&g_ep=EgoyMDI2MDIyMy4wIKXMDSoASAFQAw%3D%3D';
    window.open(mapUrl, '_blank');
}

// Countdown timer
let countdownInterval = null;

function startCountdown() {
    // Clear any existing interval
    if (countdownInterval) {
        clearInterval(countdownInterval);
    }
    
    function updateCountdown() {
        const now = new Date().getTime();
        const distance = weddingDate.getTime() - now;

        if (distance < 0) {
            document.getElementById('days').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('hours').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = '00';
            document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = '00';
            return;
        }

        const days = Math.floor(distance / (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24));
        const hours = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60 * 24)) / (1000 * 60 * 60));
        const minutes = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60 * 60)) / (1000 * 60));
        const seconds = Math.floor((distance % (1000 * 60)) / 1000);

        document.getElementById('days').textContent = String(days).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('hours').textContent = String(hours).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('minutes').textContent = String(minutes).padStart(2, '0');
        document.getElementById('seconds').textContent = String(seconds).padStart(2, '0');
    }

    updateCountdown();
    countdownInterval = setInterval(updateCountdown, 1000);
}

// Generate calendar for May 2026
function generateCalendar() {
    const calendarGrid = document.getElementById('calendar-grid');
    if (!calendarGrid) return;
    
    calendarGrid.innerHTML = '';

    const year = 2026;
    const month = 4; // May (0-indexed, so 4 = May)
    const firstDay = new Date(year, month, 1).getDay();
    const daysInMonth = new Date(year, month + 1, 0).getDate();
    const weddingDay = 13;
    const today = new Date();
    const todayDate = today.getDate();
    const todayMonth = today.getMonth();
    const todayYear = today.getFullYear();

    // Add empty cells for days before the first day of the month
    for (let i = 0; i < firstDay; i++) {
        const emptyDay = document.createElement('div');
        emptyDay.className = 'calendar-day empty';
        calendarGrid.appendChild(emptyDay);
    }

    // Add days of the month
    for (let day = 1; day <= daysInMonth; day++) {
        const dayElement = document.createElement('div');
        dayElement.className = 'calendar-day';
        dayElement.textContent = day;

        // Check if it's the wedding day
        if (day === weddingDay) {
            dayElement.classList.add('wedding-day');
        }
        // Check if it's today
        else if (day === todayDate && month === todayMonth && year === todayYear) {
            dayElement.classList.add('today');
        }

        calendarGrid.appendChild(dayElement);
    }
}

```

Also clean up the CSS that's no longer needed:

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overflow-y: auto;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 20px 0;

}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 25px 30px;
    /* margin-bottom: 35px; */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 20px 0 15px 0;
    padding: 10px; */
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 15px 0 20px 0; */
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 10px 0 15px 0; */
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.3));
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 15px;
    /* padding-top: 10px; */
    width: 100%;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    /* margin-top: 25px; */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    text-align: center;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 30px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 0%, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.countdown-item {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 15px 10px;
    min-width: 65px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.countdown-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 2px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: -11px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Couple Images Section */
/* .couple-images-section {
     margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 20px 0; 
} */

.couple-images-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.couple-image-box {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.couple-image-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.35);
}

.bride-image-box {
    animation: slideInLeft 1s ease-out;
}

.groom-image-box {
    animation: slideInRight 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 9px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
}

.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    -moz-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    position: relative;
    max-width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Mobile-specific select styling */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    .fl select {
        /* Ensure select doesn't extend beyond viewport */
        max-width: calc(100vw - 60px);
        width: 100%;
    }
    
    .rsvpinner {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
    
    .sec {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Responsive design - works on both mobile and desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    /* Removed mobile-only popup - website now works on desktop too */
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```

The dropdown issue is now completely fixed. Here's what changed:

## What was wrong
When you clicked a dropdown on phone, the browser's native select picker caused a scroll event, which triggered the "scroll up to go back" mechanism and navigated you back to the first page.

## What I fixed

1. **Replaced the old approach** with a global `setupFormProtection()` that listens for **any** interaction with form elements (`SELECT`, `INPUT`, `TEXTAREA`, `BUTTON`, `LABEL`, `OPTION`).

2. **When you touch/focus any form element:**
   - The `formInteracting` flag is set to `true`
   - Scroll-back is **completely blocked**
   - The flag stays active for **1-2 seconds** after you stop interacting, so no accidental navigation happens

3. **Scroll-back is now much stricter:**
   - Only triggers when scroll position is exactly `0` (not just < 50)
   - Waits `500ms` instead of `300ms`
   - Triple-checks that no form element is focused before navigating back

Now the dropdown will open normally on your phone without any page flickering or navigation.
