```html
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="bn" translate="no">
<head>
    <meta charset="UTF-8">
    <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no">
    <meta name="google" content="notranslate">
    <meta name="google-translate-customization" content="no">
    <title>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ আমন্ত্রণ | Prithis & Priti Wedding Invitation</title>
    <link rel="stylesheet" href="style.css">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.googleapis.com">
    <link rel="preconnect" href="https://fonts.gstatic.com" crossorigin>
    <link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Noto+Sans+Bengali:wght@400;500;600;700&family=Playfair+Display:wght@400;600;700&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
</head>
<body translate="no">
    <!-- Landing Page (First Page) -->
    <div id="landing-page" class="page active">
        <div class="landing-container">
            <!-- Decorative Corner Elements -->
            <div class="corner-decoration top-left"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration top-right"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration bottom-left"></div>
            <div class="corner-decoration bottom-right"></div>
            
            <!-- Main Content Box -->
            <div class="landing-main-box">
                <!-- Top Section -->
                <div class="landing-top-section">
                    <div class="ganesh-logo-container">
                        <img src="Assets/ganesh_logo.png" alt="Ganesh" class="ganesh-logo">
                    </div>
                    <div class="invitation-badge">
                        <p class="invited-text-bengali">আমন্ত্রণ</p>
                        <p class="invited-text-english">INVITATION</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bride and Groom Logo Section -->
                <div class="bride-groom-logos">
                    <div class="logo-box combined-logo-box">
                        <img src="Assets/bride_grrom_logo.png" alt="Bride & Groom" class="combined-logo">
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Heart Icon -->
                <div class="union-heart-container">
                    <div class="union-heart">❤</div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Middle Section - Names -->
                <div class="landing-names-section">
                    <div class="name-box name-box-left">
                        <img src="Assets/priti-removebg-preview.png" alt="প্রীতি" class="name-calligraphy">
                        <p class="english-name">Priti</p>
                    </div>
                    
                    <div class="name-box name-box-right">
                        <img src="Assets/prithis-removebg-preview.png" alt="পৃথ্বীশ" class="name-calligraphy">
                        <p class="english-name">Prithis</p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                
                <!-- Bottom Section -->
                <div class="landing-bottom-section">
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                    <p class="subtitle-text">আমাদের বিবাহে আপনাকে আমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We invite you to our wedding</span></p>
                    <div class="decorative-line"></div>
                </div>
                <!-- Open Button -->
                <button class="open-button" onclick="openInvitation()">
                    <span class="button-text-bengali">আমন্ত্রণ দেখুন</span>
                    <span class="button-text-english">VIEW INVITATION</span>
                    <span class="button-arrow">→</span>
                </button>
                
                <!-- Footer Section -->
                <div class="footer-text">
                    <p>প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ<br><span class="english-text">Prithis & Priti Wedding</span></p>
                </div>
                </div>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Main Invitation Page (Second Page) -->
    <div id="invitation-page" class="page">
        <div class="container">
            <!-- Header Section with Ganesha -->
            <header class="header">
                <div class="ganesha-icon-container">
                    <img src="Assets/ganesh_logo.png" alt="Ganesh" class="ganesha-icon-img">
                </div>
                <h1 class="invocation">ওঁ শ্রী গণেশায় নমঃ<br><span class="english-text">Om Shri Ganeshaya Namah</span></h1>
                <p class="subtitle">মঙ্গল আমন্ত্রণ<br><span class="english-text">Auspicious Invitation</span></p>
            </header>

            <!-- Bride and Groom Images Section -->
            <section class="couple-images-section">
                <div class="couple-images-container">
                    <div class="couple-image-box bride-image-box">
                        <img src="Assets/bride_logo.png" alt="Bride" class="couple-image">
                    </div>
                    <div class="couple-image-box groom-image-box">
                        <img src="Assets/grrom_logo.png" alt="Groom" class="couple-image">
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Main Invitation Section -->
            <section class="invitation-section">
                <div class="decorative-top"></div>
                
                <div class="main-content">
                    <p class="invitation-text">আমাদের কন্যার শুভ পরিণয় উপলক্ষে<br>আপনাদের সপরিবারে নিমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি<br><span class="english-text">We cordially invite you and your family<br>to the auspicious wedding of our daughter</span></p>
                    
                    <div class="couple-names">
                        <div class="name-bride">
                            <h2 class="name-large">প্রীতি<br><span class="english-name">Priti</span></h2>
                            <p class="parent-info">কন্যা / Daughter</p>
                            <p class="parent-names">সুকান্ত ও শেফালী অধিকারী<br><span class="english-text">Sukanto & Shefali Adhikari</span></p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <div class="union-symbol">&</div>
                        
                        <div class="name-groom">
                            <h2 class="name-large">পৃথ্বীশ<br><span class="english-name">Prithis</span></h2>
                            <p class="parent-info">পুত্র / Son</p>
                            <p class="parent-names">নান্টু ও পলি মন্ডল<br><span class="english-text">Nantu & Poli Mondal</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="wedding-details">
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">বিবাহের শুভদিন / Wedding Date:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">১৩ মে, ২০২৬<br><span class="english-text">May 13, 2026</span></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">সময় / Time:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">রাত্রি ১১:২৪<br><span class="english-text">11:24 PM</span></span>
                        </div>
                        <div class="detail-item">
                            <span class="detail-label">স্থান / Venue:</span>
                            <span class="detail-value">রামপুর বি.বি.টি. রোড,<br>ফ্ল্যাট- মাধুরী অ্যাপার্টমেন্ট,<br>পিলার নং ৭০<br><span class="english-text">Rampur B.B.T. Road,<br>Flat - Madhuri Apartment,<br>Pillar No. 70</span></span>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <div class="host-info">
                        <p class="host-text">আমন্ত্রণে / Invited by:</p>
                        <p class="host-names">সুকান্ত ও শেফালী অধিকারী<br><span class="english-text">Sukanto & Shefali Adhikari</span></p>
                    </div>
                </div>

                <div class="decorative-bottom"></div>
            </section>

            <!-- Countdown Section -->
            <section class="countdown-section">
                <h2 class="countdown-title">বিবাহ পর্যন্ত / Time Until Wedding</h2>
                <div class="countdown-container">
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="days">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">দিন<br>Days</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="hours">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">ঘন্টা<br>Hours</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="minutes">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">মিনিট<br>Minutes</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="countdown-separator">:</div>
                    <div class="countdown-item">
                        <div class="countdown-number" id="seconds">00</div>
                        <div class="countdown-label">সেকেন্ড<br>Seconds</div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Calendar Section -->
            <section class="calendar-section">
                <h2 class="calendar-title">মে ২০২৬ / May 2026</h2>
                <div class="calendar">
                    <div class="calendar-header">
                        <div class="day-name">রবি<br>Sun</div>
                        <div class="day-name">সোম<br>Mon</div>
                        <div class="day-name">মঙ্গল<br>Tue</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বুধ<br>Wed</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বৃহ<br>Thu</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শুক্র<br>Fri</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শনি<br>Sat</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="calendar-grid" id="calendar-grid">
                        <!-- Calendar days will be generated by JavaScript -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Our Moments Section -->
            <section class="moments-section">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">📸</span><span class="sh-title">Our Moments</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <p class="moments-subtitle">আমাদের মুহূর্ত · Memories we cherish</p>

                <div class="moments-timeline">
                    <!-- Moment Card 1 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_1.png" alt="Memory 1" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">প্রথম দেখা · First Meet</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">যেখান থেকে সব শুরু হয়েছিল — দুটি আত্মার সুন্দর মিলন।<br><span class="english-text">Where it all began — a beautiful meeting of two souls.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 2 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_2.png" alt="Memory 2" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">একসাথে ভ্রমণ · Travelling Together</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">একসাথে পাহাড়ের চূড়ায় — প্রতিটি পথই ভালোবাসার গল্প।<br><span class="english-text">Adventures in the mountains — every journey a love story.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 3 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_3.png" alt="Memory 3" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">হাসির মুহূর্ত · Moments of Joy</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">একসাথে হাসি, একসাথে জীবন — এই ছোট্ট মুহূর্তগুলোই সবচেয়ে মূল্যবান।<br><span class="english-text">Laughter together, life together — these little moments are priceless.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 4 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_4.png" alt="Memory 4" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">চিরকালের ভালোবাসা · Forever in Love</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">তোমার চোখে আমার পৃথিবী — এই ভালোবাসা চিরন্তন।<br><span class="english-text">My world in your eyes — a love that lasts forever.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Map QR Code Section -->
            <section class="qr-section">
                <div class="map-qr-wrapper">
                    <!-- Map Image -->
                    <div class="map-image-container" onclick="openMapLocation()" style="cursor: pointer;">
                        <img src="Assets/mapped_view.jpeg" alt="Wedding Venue Location" class="map-image">
                        <div class="map-overlay">
                            <span class="map-icon">📍</span>
                            <p class="map-click-text">Click to open in Maps</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- QR Code -->
                    <div class="qr-container" onclick="openMapLocation()" style="cursor: pointer;">
                        <div class="qr-placeholder" id="map-qr-code">
                            <div class="qr-icon">📍</div>
                            <p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>
                        </div>
                        <p class="scan-text">স্ক্যান করুন<br><span class="english-text">Scan QR Code</span></p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p class="location-text">ঠিকানার জন্য এখানে ক্লিক করুন<br><span class="english-text">Click here for Location</span></p>
            </section>

            <!-- RSVP Section -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">✉️</span><span class="sh-title">RSVP</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <div class="rsvpinner">
                    <div class="rtitle">আপনার উত্তর দিন</div>
                    <p class="rsub">আমাদের বিশেষ দিনে আপনার উপস্থিতি নিশ্চিত করুন।<br>Kindly confirm your attendance.</p>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Name · আপনার নাম</label><input type="text" id="r-name" placeholder="নাম লিখুন"></div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Guests · কতজন</label>
                        <select id="r-guests">
                            <option>১ জন · Just me</option>
                            <option>২ জন · Two</option>
                            <option>৩ জন · Three</option>
                            <option>৪+ জন · Four or more</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Will You Be There?</label>
                        <select id="r-attend">
                            <option>হ্যাঁ, অবশ্যই · Joyfully attending</option>
                            <option>সম্ভবত · Maybe attending</option>
                            <option>দুঃখিত, পারব না · Regretfully unable</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Wishes · আশীর্বাদ</label><textarea id="r-wish" placeholder="শুভকামনা লিখুন..."></textarea></div>
                    <button class="rbtn" onclick="sendRSVP()">Send RSVP · পাঠান</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- BLESSINGS -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh">
                    <span class="sh-ico">🙏</span>
                    <span class="sh-title">Blessings</span>
                    <div class="sh-line"></div>
                    <button class="clear-blessings-btn" id="clear-blessings-btn" onclick="clearBlessings()" style="display: none;">
                        <span class="clear-icon">🗑️</span>
                        <span class="clear-text">Clear</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="sb" id="wishes-wall">
                    <div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="footer">
                <span class="footer-om">🕉️</span>
                <div class="footer-names">Priti & Prithis</div>
                <div class="footer-date">১৩ মে · May 13, 2026</div>
                <div class="footer-div"></div>
                <div class="footer-note">আপনার আশীর্বাদ আমাদের সবচেয়ে বড় উপহার</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Digital Invitation Footer -->
            <div class="digital-footer">
                <p class="digital-footer-text">Digital Invitation Created by Subrata Pal</p>
                <p class="copyright-text">Copyright © 2026 - All Rights Reserved</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Background Music -->
    <audio id="background-music" loop>
        <source src="Assets/ReelAudio-43395.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
        Your browser does not support the audio element.
    </audio>

    <script src="https://cdn.rawgit.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs/gh-pages/qrcode.min.js"></script>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```

```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overflow-y: auto;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 20px 0;

}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 25px 30px;
    /* margin-bottom: 35px; */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 21px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 20px 0 15px 0;
    padding: 10px; */
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 15px 0 20px 0; */
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

/* Calligraphy name images */
.name-calligraphy {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 120px;
    height: auto;
    object-fit: contain;
    margin-bottom: -31px;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 10px 0 15px 0; */
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.3));
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 15px;
    /* padding-top: 10px; */
    width: 100%;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    /* margin-top: 25px; */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    text-align: center;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 30px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 0%, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2px;
    /* flex-wrap: wrap; */
}

.countdown-item {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 15px 10px;
    min-width: 65px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.countdown-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 2px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: -11px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Couple Images Section */
/* .couple-images-section {
     margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 20px 0; 
} */

.couple-images-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.couple-image-box {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.couple-image-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.35);
}

.bride-image-box {
    animation: slideInLeft 1s ease-out;
}

.groom-image-box {
    animation: slideInRight 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 9px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Our Moments Section */
.moments-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFDF5 0%, #FFF8E7 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
}

.moments-subtitle {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-style: italic;
}

.moments-timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 22px;
    position: relative;
}

/* Vertical line connecting cards */
.moments-timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, #DAA520 10%, #DAA520 90%, transparent);
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.moment-card {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    animation: momentFadeIn 0.8s ease-out both;
}

.moment-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.55s; }

.moment-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

@keyframes momentFadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(25px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.moment-image-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 220px;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.moment-image-wrapper::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6));
    pointer-events: none;
}

.moment-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.5s ease;
}

.moment-card:hover .moment-image {
    transform: scale(1.03);
}

.moment-info {
    padding: 16px 18px 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.moment-date {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.moment-caption {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.moment-caption .english-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 3px;
}

/* Small decorative dot between cards */
.moment-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -13px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #DAA520;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    z-index: 2;
}

.moment-card:first-child::before {
    display: none;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0 5px;
}

.map-qr-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}

/* Map Image Container */
.map-image-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    background: #FFFFFF;
}

.map-image-container:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2);
}

.map-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.map-image-container:hover .map-image {
    transform: scale(1.02);
}

.map-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5));
    padding: 12px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
}

.map-image-container:hover .map-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.map-icon {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.map-click-text {
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    margin: 0;
}

/* QR Code Container */
.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 200px;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.location-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 10px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Responsive adjustments for map section */
@media (min-width: 600px) {
    .map-qr-wrapper {
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 25px;
    }
    
    .map-image-container {
        flex: 1;
        max-width: 60%;
    }
    
    .qr-container {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        max-width: 200px;
    }
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.clear-blessings-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    background: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.1);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.4);
    border-radius: 8px;
    color: #CD5C5C;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-left: auto;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.clear-blessings-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.2);
    border-color: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.6);
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.clear-blessings-btn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.clear-icon {
    font-size: 14px;
}

.clear-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    -moz-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    position: relative;
    max-width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Mobile-specific select styling */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    .fl select {
        /* Ensure select doesn't extend beyond viewport */
        max-width: calc(100vw - 60px);
        width: 100%;
    }
    
    .rsvpinner {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
    
    .sec {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Digital Invitation Footer */
.digital-footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.digital-footer-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    opacity: 0.85;
}

.copyright-text {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #654321;
    margin: 0;
    font-weight: 400;
    opacity: 0.7;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

/* Responsive design - works on both mobile and desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    /* Removed mobile-only popup - website now works on desktop too */
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```


Added the map image to the QR section and updated the layout. Here's what changed:

**New layout features:**
- **Map image** — displays `mapped_view.jpeg` with a golden border and shadow
- **QR code** — positioned below the map (side-by-side on larger screens)
- **Hover effects** — map image shows a subtle overlay with "Click to open in Maps" on hover
- **Both clickable** — clicking the map image or QR code opens the Google Maps location
- **Responsive design** — stacks vertically on mobile, side-by-side on larger screens
- **Styling** — matches the invitation theme with golden accents

**Layout structure:**
- On mobile: Map image on top, QR code below
- On desktop/tablet: Map image on the left (60% width), QR code on the right (200px width)

The section is now integrated and ready to use.
