```html
            <!-- Calendar Section -->
            <section class="calendar-section">
                <h2 class="calendar-title">মে ২০২৬ / May 2026</h2>
                <div class="calendar">
                    <div class="calendar-header">
                        <div class="day-name">রবি<br>Sun</div>
                        <div class="day-name">সোম<br>Mon</div>
                        <div class="day-name">মঙ্গল<br>Tue</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বুধ<br>Wed</div>
                        <div class="day-name">বৃহ<br>Thu</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শুক্র<br>Fri</div>
                        <div class="day-name">শনি<br>Sat</div>
                    </div>
                    <div class="calendar-grid" id="calendar-grid">
                        <!-- Calendar days will be generated by JavaScript -->
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Our Moments Section -->
            <section class="moments-section">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">📸</span><span class="sh-title">Our Moments</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <p class="moments-subtitle">আমাদের মুহূর্ত · Memories we cherish</p>

                <div class="moments-timeline">
                    <!-- Moment Card 1 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_1.png" alt="Memory 1" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">প্রথম দেখা · First Meet</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">যেখান থেকে সব শুরু হয়েছিল — দুটি আত্মার সুন্দর মিলন।<br><span class="english-text">Where it all began — a beautiful meeting of two souls.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 2 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_2.png" alt="Memory 2" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">একসাথে ভ্রমণ · Travelling Together</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">একসাথে পাহাড়ের চূড়ায় — প্রতিটি পথই ভালোবাসার গল্প।<br><span class="english-text">Adventures in the mountains — every journey a love story.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 3 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_3.png" alt="Memory 3" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">হাসির মুহূর্ত · Moments of Joy</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">একসাথে হাসি, একসাথে জীবন — এই ছোট্ট মুহূর্তগুলোই সবচেয়ে মূল্যবান।<br><span class="english-text">Laughter together, life together — these little moments are priceless.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>

                    <!-- Moment Card 4 -->
                    <div class="moment-card">
                        <div class="moment-image-wrapper">
                            <img src="Assets/memories_4.png" alt="Memory 4" class="moment-image">
                        </div>
                        <div class="moment-info">
                            <div class="moment-date">চিরকালের ভালোবাসা · Forever in Love</div>
                            <p class="moment-caption">তোমার চোখে আমার পৃথিবী — এই ভালোবাসা চিরন্তন।<br><span class="english-text">My world in your eyes — a love that lasts forever.</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                </div>
            </section>

            <!-- Map QR Code Section -->
            <section class="qr-section">
                <div class="map-qr-wrapper">
                    <!-- Map Image -->
                    <div class="map-image-container" onclick="openMapLocation()" style="cursor: pointer;">
                        <img src="Assets/mapped_view.jpeg" alt="Wedding Venue Location" class="map-image">
                        <div class="map-overlay">
                            <span class="map-icon">📍</span>
                            <p class="map-click-text">Click to open in Maps</p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <!-- QR Code -->
                    <div class="qr-container" onclick="openMapLocation()" style="cursor: pointer;">
                        <div class="qr-placeholder" id="map-qr-code">
                            <div class="qr-icon">📍</div>
                            <p class="qr-text">QR Code</p>
                        </div>
                        <p class="scan-text">স্ক্যান করুন<br><span class="english-text">Scan QR Code</span></p>
                    </div>
                </div>
                <p class="location-text">ঠিকানার জন্য এখানে ক্লিক করুন<br><span class="english-text">Click here for Location</span></p>
            </section>

            <!-- RSVP Section -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh"><span class="sh-ico">✉️</span><span class="sh-title">RSVP</span><div class="sh-line"></div></div>
                <div class="rsvpinner">
                    <div class="rtitle">আপনার উত্তর দিন</div>
                    <p class="rsub">আমাদের বিশেষ দিনে আপনার উপস্থিতি নিশ্চিত করুন।<br>Kindly confirm your attendance.</p>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Name · আপনার নাম</label><input type="text" id="r-name" placeholder="নাম লিখুন"></div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Guests · কতজন</label>
                        <select id="r-guests">
                            <option>১ জন · Just me</option>
                            <option>২ জন · Two</option>
                            <option>৩ জন · Three</option>
                            <option>৪+ জন · Four or more</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Will You Be There?</label>
                        <select id="r-attend">
                            <option>হ্যাঁ, অবশ্যই · Joyfully attending</option>
                            <option>সম্ভবত · Maybe attending</option>
                            <option>দুঃখিত, পারব না · Regretfully unable</option>
                        </select>
                    </div>
                    <div class="fl"><label>Your Wishes · আশীর্বাদ</label><textarea id="r-wish" placeholder="শুভকামনা লিখুন..."></textarea></div>
                    <button class="rbtn" onclick="sendRSVP()">Send RSVP · পাঠান</button>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- BLESSINGS -->
            <div class="sec">
                <div class="sh">
                    <span class="sh-ico">🙏</span>
                    <span class="sh-title">Blessings</span>
                    <div class="sh-line"></div>
                    <button class="clear-blessings-btn" id="clear-blessings-btn" onclick="clearBlessings()" style="display: none;">
                        <span class="clear-icon">🗑️</span>
                        <span class="clear-text">Clear</span>
                    </button>
                </div>
                <div class="sb" id="wishes-wall">
                    <div class="wish-empty">আশীর্বাদ এখানে দেখা যাবে<br><span style="font-size:11px">Blessings will appear here</span></div>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Contribution Section -->
            <div class="sec contribution-section">
                <div class="sh">
                    <span class="sh-ico">💝</span>
                    <span class="sh-title">Contribution</span>
                    <div class="sh-line"></div>
                </div>
                <div class="contribution-content">
                    <p class="contribution-subtitle">আপনার শুভেচ্ছা আমাদের জন্য মূল্যবান<br><span class="english-text">Your blessings are precious to us</span></p>
                    
                    <div class="payment-wrapper">
                        <!-- PhonePe QR Code -->
                        <div class="payment-qr-container">
                            <div class="payment-qr-box">
                                <img src="Assets/Phone_pay_qr.jpeg" alt="PhonePe QR Code" class="payment-qr-image">
                            </div>
                            <p class="payment-qr-text">QR কোড স্ক্যান করুন<br><span class="english-text">Scan QR Code</span></p>
                        </div>
                        
                        <!-- UPI ID -->
                        <div class="upi-container">
                            <p class="upi-label">UPI ID</p>
                            <div class="upi-id-box" onclick="copyUPI()">
                                <span class="upi-id-text" id="upi-id">7003167407-2@ibl</span>
                                <span class="copy-icon" id="copy-icon">📋</span>
                            </div>
                            <p class="upi-hint">ট্যাপ করে কপি করুন<br><span class="english-text">Tap to copy</span></p>
                        </div>
                    </div>
                    
                    <p class="contribution-note">আপনার ভালোবাসা এবং শুভেচ্ছা আমাদের সবচেয়ে বড় উপহার<br><span class="english-text">Your love and blessings are our greatest gift</span></p>
                </div>
            </div>

            <!-- Footer -->
            <div class="footer">
                <span class="footer-om">🕉️</span>
                <div class="footer-names">Priti & Prithis</div>
                <div class="footer-date">১৩ মে · May 13, 2026</div>
                <div class="footer-div"></div>
                <div class="footer-note">আপনার আশীর্বাদ আমাদের সবচেয়ে বড় উপহার</div>
            </div>

            <!-- Digital Invitation Footer -->
            <div class="digital-footer">
                <p class="digital-footer-text">Digital Invitation Created by @Subrata Pal</p>
                <div class="social-icons">
                    <a href="https://www.facebook.com/share/1FMgeJs7G8/" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon" aria-label="Facebook">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
                            <path d="M24 12.073c0-6.627-5.373-12-12-12s-12 5.373-12 12c0 5.99 4.388 10.954 10.125 11.854v-8.385H7.078v-3.47h3.047V9.43c0-3.007 1.792-4.669 4.533-4.669 1.312 0 2.686.235 2.686.235v2.953H15.83c-1.491 0-1.956.925-1.956 1.874v2.25h3.328l-.532 3.47h-2.796v8.385C19.612 23.027 24 18.062 24 12.073z"/>
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://www.instagram.com/mrpal___?igsh=MTMxcnUwdjUwNWxzOQ==" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon" aria-label="Instagram">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
                            <path d="M12 2.163c3.204 0 3.584.012 4.85.07 3.252.148 4.771 1.691 4.919 4.919.058 1.265.069 1.645.069 4.849 0 3.205-.012 3.584-.069 4.849-.149 3.225-1.664 4.771-4.919 4.919-1.266.058-1.644.07-4.85.07-3.204 0-3.584-.012-4.849-.07-3.26-.149-4.771-1.699-4.919-4.92-.058-1.265-.07-1.644-.07-4.849 0-3.204.013-3.583.07-4.849.149-3.227 1.664-4.771 4.919-4.919 1.266-.057 1.645-.069 4.849-.069zm0-2.163c-3.259 0-3.667.014-4.947.072-4.358.2-6.78 2.618-6.98 6.98-.059 1.281-.073 1.689-.073 4.948 0 3.259.014 3.668.072 4.948.2 4.358 2.618 6.78 6.98 6.98 1.281.058 1.689.072 4.948.072 3.259 0 3.668-.014 4.948-.072 4.354-.2 6.782-2.618 6.979-6.98.059-1.28.073-1.689.073-4.948 0-3.259-.014-3.667-.072-4.947-.196-4.354-2.617-6.78-6.979-6.98-1.281-.059-1.69-.073-4.949-.073zm0 5.838c-3.403 0-6.162 2.759-6.162 6.162s2.759 6.163 6.162 6.163 6.162-2.759 6.162-6.163c0-3.403-2.759-6.162-6.162-6.162zm0 10.162c-2.209 0-4-1.79-4-4 0-2.209 1.791-4 4-4s4 1.791 4 4c0 2.21-1.791 4-4 4zm6.406-11.845c-.796 0-1.441.645-1.441 1.44s.645 1.44 1.441 1.44c.795 0 1.439-.645 1.439-1.44s-.644-1.44-1.439-1.44z"/>
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                    <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/subrata-pal-5b977632a" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer" class="social-icon" aria-label="LinkedIn">
                        <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="currentColor">
                            <path d="M20.447 20.452h-3.554v-5.569c0-1.328-.027-3.037-1.852-3.037-1.853 0-2.136 1.445-2.136 2.939v5.667H9.351V9h3.414v1.561h.046c.477-.9 1.637-1.85 3.37-1.85 3.601 0 4.267 2.37 4.267 5.455v6.286zM5.337 7.433c-1.144 0-2.063-.926-2.063-2.065 0-1.138.92-2.063 2.063-2.063 1.14 0 2.064.925 2.064 2.063 0 1.139-.925 2.065-2.064 2.065zm1.782 13.019H3.555V9h3.564v11.452zM22.225 0H1.771C.792 0 0 .774 0 1.729v20.542C0 23.227.792 24 1.771 24h20.451C23.2 24 24 23.227 24 22.271V1.729C24 .774 23.2 0 22.222 0h.003z"/>
                        </svg>
                    </a>
                </div>
                <p class="copyright-text">Copyright © 2026 - All Rights Reserved</p>
            </div>
        </div>
    </div>

    <!-- Background Music -->
    <audio id="background-music" loop>
        <source src="Assets/ReelAudio-43395.mp3" type="audio/mpeg">
        Your browser does not support the audio element.
    </audio>

    <script src="https://cdn.rawgit.com/davidshimjs/qrcodejs/gh-pages/qrcode.min.js"></script>
    <script src="script.js"></script>
</body>
</html>

```


Adding CSS styles for the social media icons:


```css
* {
    margin: 0;
    padding: 0;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

body {
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', 'Arial', sans-serif;
    background: #F5F5DC;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    padding: 0;
    position: relative;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    overflow-y: auto;
    -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
    -webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch;
}

body::before {
    content: '';
    position: fixed;
    top: 0;
    left: 0;
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    background-image: 
        repeating-linear-gradient(
            45deg,
            transparent,
            transparent 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 2px,
            rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.2) 4px
        );
    opacity: 0.2;
    z-index: 0;
    pointer-events: none;
}

/* Page Management */
.page {
    display: none;
    min-height: 100vh;
    width: 100%;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
}

.page.active {
    display: block;
}


/* Landing Page Styles - Unique Design */
.landing-container {
    min-height: 100vh;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    padding: 20px;
    position: relative;
    overflow: hidden;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #FFF8E7 0%, #F5F5DC 50%, #FFF8E7 100%);
}

/* Corner Decorations */
.corner-decoration {
    position: absolute;
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    z-index: 1;
}

.corner-decoration.top-left {
    top: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 20px 0 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.top-right {
    top: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-bottom: none;
    border-radius: 0 20px 0 0;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-left {
    bottom: 15px;
    left: 24px;
    border-right: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 0 20px;
}

.corner-decoration.bottom-right {
    bottom: 15px;
    right: 24px;
    border-left: none;
    border-top: none;
    border-radius: 0 0 20px 0;

}

/* Main Box */
.landing-main-box {
    position: relative;
    width: 90%;
    max-width: 420px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    padding: 25px 30px;
    /* margin-bottom: 35px; */
    box-shadow: 0 10px 40px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15), 0 0 0 1px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    z-index: 2;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
}

/* Top Section */
.landing-top-section {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 21px;
}

.ganesh-logo-container {
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesh-logo {
    width: 70px;
    height: auto;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
}

@keyframes float {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: translateY(0px);
    }
    50% {
        transform: translateY(-8px);
    }
}

.invitation-badge {
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    padding: 10px 25px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 25px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.invited-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    text-align: center;
}

.invited-text-english {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin: 2px 0 0 0;
    letter-spacing: 2px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

/* Bride and Groom Logo Section */
.bride-groom-logos {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 20px 0 15px 0;
    padding: 10px; */
}

.logo-box {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.combined-logo-box {
    width: 220px;
    height: 220px;
    animation: fadeInScale 1s ease-out, float 3s ease-in-out infinite 1s;
}

.combined-logo {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes fadeInScale {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: scale(0.8);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: scale(1);
    }
}

/* Names Section */
.landing-names-section {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: space-between;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 15px 0 20px 0; */
    gap: 12px;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-box {
    flex: 1;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 10px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.name-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
}

.name-box-left {
    border-right: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.name-box-right {
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.landing-name {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #000000;
    margin: 0 0 8px 0;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.2;
}

/* Calligraphy name images */
.name-calligraphy {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 120px;
    height: auto;
    object-fit: contain;
    margin-bottom: -31px;
}

.english-name {
    display: block;
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 600;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-top: 5px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.union-heart-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    /* margin: 10px 0 15px 0; */
}

.union-heart {
    font-size: 32px;
    color: #FF6347;
    animation: pulse 2s ease-in-out infinite;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 2px 4px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.3));
}

@keyframes pulse {
    0%, 100% {
        transform: scale(1);
        opacity: 1;
    }
    50% {
        transform: scale(1.1);
        opacity: 0.8;
    }
}

/* Bottom Section */
.landing-bottom-section {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 15px;
    /* padding-top: 10px; */
    width: 100%;
}

.decorative-line {
    width: 80px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 12px auto;
}

.subtitle-text {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin: 10px 0;
}

.english-text {
    display: block;
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 4px;
    opacity: 0.85;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* Open Button */
.open-button {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    padding: 18px 50px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    /* margin-top: 25px; */
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 30px;
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
}

.button-text-bengali {
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.button-text-english {
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1.5px;
    text-transform: uppercase;
    opacity: 0.95;
}

.button-arrow {
    position: absolute;
    right: 20px;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translateY(-50%);
    font-size: 18px;
}

.open-button:active {
    transform: scale(0.96);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

/* Footer */
.footer-text {
    margin-top: 20px;
    padding: 10px 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.95);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 2;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 280px;
    text-align: center;
}

.footer-text p {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-style: italic;
    text-align: center;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin: 0;
}

/* Countdown Section */
.countdown-section {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 30px 20px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.9) 0%, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.countdown-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    line-height: 1.5;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 2px;
    /* flex-wrap: wrap; */
}

.countdown-item {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFFFF 0%, #FFFEF8 100%);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 15px 10px;
    min-width: 65px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.countdown-item:hover {
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.countdown-number {
    font-size: 28px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    line-height: 1;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.countdown-label {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.countdown-separator {
    font-size: 24px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 700;
    margin: 0 2px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

/* Calendar Section */
.calendar-section {
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.calendar-title {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 16px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.calendar {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 1px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.calendar-header {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.day-name {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-weight: 600;
    padding: 5px 2px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.calendar-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: repeat(7, 1fr);
    gap: 3px;
}

.calendar-day {
    aspect-ratio: 1;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    border-radius: 5px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.2s ease;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.calendar-day.empty {
    visibility: hidden;
}

.calendar-day.other-month {
    color: #D3D3D3;
}

.calendar-day.today {
    background: #DAA520;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
}

.calendar-day.wedding-day {
    background: #FF6347;
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-weight: 700;
    box-shadow: 0 0 10px rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.5);
}

.calendar-day:hover:not(.empty):not(.other-month) {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

/* Container Styles for Invitation Page */
.container {
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 15px;
    box-shadow: 0 5px 20px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    padding: 25px 20px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    margin: 0 auto;
    overflow-x: hidden;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Header Styles */
.header {
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    position: relative;
}

.ganesha-icon-container {
    margin-bottom: -11px;
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
}

.ganesha-icon-img {
    width: 60px;
    height: 60px;
    object-fit: contain;
    filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    animation: glow 3s ease-in-out infinite;
}

@keyframes glow {
    0%, 100% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.5));
    }
    50% {
        filter: drop-shadow(0 0 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.8));
    }
}

.invocation {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 18px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.subtitle {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Couple Images Section */
/* .couple-images-section {
     margin: 25px 0;
    padding: 20px 0; 
} */

.couple-images-container {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 20px;
    flex-wrap: wrap;
}

.couple-image-box {
    width: 140px;
    height: 140px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border: 3px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 20px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.couple-image-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-5px) scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.35);
}

.bride-image-box {
    animation: slideInLeft 1s ease-out;
}

.groom-image-box {
    animation: slideInRight 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    padding: 10px;
}

@keyframes slideInLeft {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(-30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

@keyframes slideInRight {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateX(30px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateX(0);
    }
}

/* Decorative Elements */
.decorative-top,
.decorative-bottom {
    height: 25px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, 
        #FFA500 0%, 
        #FFD700 20%, 
        #FFA500 40%, 
        #FFD700 60%, 
        #FFA500 80%, 
        #FFD700 100%);
    margin: 9px 0;
    border-radius: 5px;
    opacity: 0.8;
    position: relative;
}

.decorative-top::before,
.decorative-bottom::before {
    content: '🌸';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 50%;
    transform: translate(-50%, -50%);
    font-size: 16px;
    opacity: 0.6;
}

/* Main Content */
.main-content {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.5);
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin: 15px 0;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

.invitation-text {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.8;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

/* Couple Names Section */
.couple-names {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 30px 0;
    gap: 15px;
}

.name-bride,
.name-groom {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
}

.name-large {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 30px;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    text-shadow: 2px 2px 4px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
    font-weight: 700;
    letter-spacing: 1px;
    line-height: 1.3;
}

.parent-info {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.parent-names {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.union-symbol {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 36px;
    color: #DAA520;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 1px 1px 2px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.2);
    margin: 5px 0;
    transform: rotate(90deg);
}

/* Wedding Details */
.wedding-details {
    margin: 30px 0;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
}

.detail-item {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.detail-item:last-child {
    margin-bottom: 0;
}

.detail-label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 6px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.detail-value {
    display: block;
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Host Info */
.host-info {
    text-align: center;
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
}

.host-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.host-names {
    color: #CD853F;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 600;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Our Moments Section */
.moments-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #FFFDF5 0%, #FFF8E7 100%);
    border-radius: 20px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
}

.moments-subtitle {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 25px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-style: italic;
}

.moments-timeline {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 22px;
    position: relative;
}

/* Vertical line connecting cards */
.moments-timeline::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    left: 50%;
    top: 0;
    bottom: 0;
    width: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, transparent, #DAA520 10%, #DAA520 90%, transparent);
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    z-index: 0;
}

.moment-card {
    position: relative;
    z-index: 1;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 16px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.15);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.25);
    transition: transform 0.3s ease, box-shadow 0.3s ease;
    animation: momentFadeIn 0.8s ease-out both;
}

.moment-card:nth-child(1) { animation-delay: 0.1s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(2) { animation-delay: 0.25s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(3) { animation-delay: 0.4s; }
.moment-card:nth-child(4) { animation-delay: 0.55s; }

.moment-card:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 8px 25px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.12), 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
}

@keyframes momentFadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(25px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.moment-image-wrapper {
    width: 100%;
    height: 220px;
    overflow: hidden;
    position: relative;
}

.moment-image-wrapper::after {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    height: 40px;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.6));
    pointer-events: none;
}

.moment-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: cover;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.5s ease;
}

.moment-card:hover .moment-image {
    transform: scale(1.03);
}

.moment-info {
    padding: 16px 18px 18px;
    text-align: center;
}

.moment-date {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
    line-height: 1.4;
}

.moment-caption {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    line-height: 1.7;
    font-weight: 400;
}

.moment-caption .english-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    margin-top: 3px;
}

/* Small decorative dot between cards */
.moment-card::before {
    content: '';
    position: absolute;
    top: -13px;
    left: 50%;
    transform: translateX(-50%);
    width: 10px;
    height: 10px;
    background: #DAA520;
    border-radius: 50%;
    border: 2px solid #FFFFFF;
    box-shadow: 0 1px 4px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    z-index: 2;
}

.moment-card:first-child::before {
    display: none;
}

/* QR Code Section */
.qr-section {
    margin-top: 25px;
    text-align: center;
    padding: 0 5px;
}

.map-qr-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 20px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
}

/* Map Image Container */
.map-image-container {
    position: relative;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 100%;
    border-radius: 12px;
    overflow: hidden;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 18px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    background: #FFFFFF;
}

.map-image-container:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 25px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2);
}

.map-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: auto;
    display: block;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.map-image-container:hover .map-image {
    transform: scale(1.02);
}

.map-overlay {
    position: absolute;
    bottom: 0;
    left: 0;
    right: 0;
    background: linear-gradient(transparent, rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5));
    padding: 12px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 4px;
    opacity: 0;
    transition: opacity 0.3s ease;
}

.map-image-container:hover .map-overlay {
    opacity: 1;
}

.map-icon {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.map-click-text {
    color: #FFFFFF;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    text-shadow: 0 1px 3px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.5);
    margin: 0;
}

/* QR Code Container */
.qr-container {
    display: inline-block;
    padding: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border: 2px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 200px;
}

.qr-container:hover {
    transform: scale(1.02);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.qr-container:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.qr-placeholder {
    width: 130px;
    height: 130px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 8px;
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    margin: 0 auto 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 3px 10px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
}

.qr-icon {
    font-size: 35px;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
}

.scan-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 8px;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.location-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 500;
    margin-top: 10px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-style: italic;
}

/* QR Code Canvas */
#map-qr-code canvas {
    width: 100% !important;
    height: 100% !important;
}

#map-qr-code {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
}

/* Responsive adjustments for map section */
@media (min-width: 600px) {
    .map-qr-wrapper {
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 25px;
    }
    
    .map-image-container {
        flex: 1;
        max-width: 60%;
    }
    
    .qr-container {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        max-width: 200px;
    }
}

/* RSVP Section */
.sec {
    margin-top: 25px;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.sh {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 10px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    position: relative;
}

.sh-ico {
    font-size: 24px;
}

.sh-title {
    font-size: 18px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.sh-line {
    flex: 1;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin-left: 10px;
}

.clear-blessings-btn {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 5px;
    padding: 6px 12px;
    background: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.1);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.4);
    border-radius: 8px;
    color: #CD5C5C;
    font-size: 11px;
    font-weight: 600;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-left: auto;
    white-space: nowrap;
}

.clear-blessings-btn:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.2);
    border-color: rgba(255, 99, 71, 0.6);
    transform: scale(1.05);
}

.clear-blessings-btn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
}

.clear-icon {
    font-size: 14px;
}

.clear-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

.rsvpinner {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.rtitle {
    font-size: 20px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-align: center;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
}

.rsub {
    text-align: center;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 12px;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

.fl {
    margin-bottom: 18px;
}

.fl label {
    display: block;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.fl input[type="text"],
.fl select,
.fl textarea {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 12px;
    border: 2px solid #F5DEB3;
    border-radius: 8px;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-family: 'Noto Sans Bengali', sans-serif;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    color: #654321;
    transition: border-color 0.3s ease;
    -webkit-appearance: none;
    -moz-appearance: none;
    appearance: none;
    position: relative;
    max-width: 100%;
    box-sizing: border-box;
}

/* Mobile-specific select styling */
@media (max-width: 767px) {
    .fl select {
        /* Ensure select doesn't extend beyond viewport */
        max-width: calc(100vw - 60px);
        width: 100%;
    }
    
    .rsvpinner {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
    
    .sec {
        max-width: 100%;
    }
}

.fl input[type="text"]:focus,
.fl select:focus,
.fl textarea:focus {
    outline: none;
    border-color: #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 0 5px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.fl textarea {
    min-height: 80px;
    resize: vertical;
}

.rbtn {
    width: 100%;
    padding: 15px;
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, #DAA520 0%, #B8860B 100%);
    color: #FFFFFF;
    border: none;
    border-radius: 10px;
    font-size: 15px;
    font-weight: 700;
    cursor: pointer;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.4);
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    margin-top: 10px;
}

.rbtn:active {
    transform: scale(0.98);
    box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Blessings Section */
.sb {
    min-height: 150px;
    padding: 20px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.4);
    border-radius: 10px;
    border: 2px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.wish-empty {
    text-align: center;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    opacity: 0.6;
    padding: 20px;
    line-height: 1.8;
}

.wish-item {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    padding: 15px;
    margin-bottom: 12px;
    border-radius: 8px;
    border-left: 3px solid #DAA520;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 5px rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.1);
}

.wish-name {
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 14px;
    margin-bottom: 5px;
}

.wish-message {
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 13px;
    line-height: 1.6;
    margin-top: 5px;
}

/* Contribution Section */
.contribution-section {
    background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8) 0%, rgba(255, 248, 235, 0.9) 100%);
}

.contribution-content {
    padding: 15px 0;
}

.contribution-subtitle {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 13px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.6;
    font-style: italic;
}

.payment-wrapper {
    display: flex;
    flex-direction: column;
    gap: 25px;
    align-items: center;
    margin-bottom: 20px;
}

/* PhonePe QR Code Container */
.payment-qr-container {
    text-align: center;
}

.payment-qr-box {
    width: 200px;
    height: 200px;
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border-radius: 12px;
    padding: 12px;
    box-shadow: 0 4px 15px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.15);
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    margin: 0 auto 10px;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
}

.payment-qr-box:hover {
    transform: translateY(-3px);
    box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(139, 69, 19, 0.2);
}

.payment-qr-image {
    width: 100%;
    height: 100%;
    object-fit: contain;
    border-radius: 8px;
}

.payment-qr-text {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 12px;
    font-weight: 500;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

/* UPI ID Container */
.upi-container {
    text-align: center;
    width: 100%;
    max-width: 300px;
}

.upi-label {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 13px;
    font-weight: 600;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
}

.upi-id-box {
    background: #FFFFFF;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
    border-radius: 10px;
    padding: 12px 15px;
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
    gap: 10px;
    cursor: pointer;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.upi-id-box:hover {
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.9);
    border-color: #B8860B;
    transform: translateY(-2px);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.upi-id-box:active {
    transform: translateY(0);
}

.upi-id-text {
    flex: 1;
    color: #654321;
    font-size: 14px;
    font-weight: 600;
    font-family: 'Courier New', monospace;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    word-break: break-all;
    text-align: left;
}

.copy-icon {
    font-size: 18px;
    flex-shrink: 0;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.upi-id-box:hover .copy-icon {
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

.upi-id-box.copied .copy-icon::after {
    content: '✓';
    color: #28a745;
}

.upi-hint {
    color: #8B4513;
    font-size: 11px;
    opacity: 0.7;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.5;
}

.contribution-note {
    text-align: center;
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.7;
    margin-top: 15px;
    padding-top: 15px;
    border-top: 1px dashed rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

/* Responsive adjustments for contribution section */
@media (min-width: 600px) {
    .payment-wrapper {
        flex-direction: row;
        justify-content: center;
        align-items: flex-start;
        gap: 30px;
    }
    
    .payment-qr-container {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
    }
    
    .upi-container {
        flex: 0 0 auto;
        max-width: 280px;
    }
}

/* Footer */
.footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 25px 15px;
    margin-top: 30px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.8);
    border-radius: 15px;
    border: 2px solid #DAA520;
}

.footer-om {
    font-size: 30px;
    display: block;
    margin-bottom: 10px;
}

.footer-names {
    font-family: 'Playfair Display', serif;
    font-size: 22px;
    font-weight: 700;
    color: #DAA520;
    margin-bottom: 8px;
}

.footer-date {
    font-size: 14px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    font-weight: 500;
}

.footer-div {
    width: 60px;
    height: 2px;
    background: linear-gradient(90deg, transparent, #DAA520, transparent);
    margin: 15px auto;
}

.footer-note {
    font-size: 12px;
    color: #654321;
    font-style: italic;
    line-height: 1.6;
}

/* Digital Invitation Footer */
.digital-footer {
    text-align: center;
    padding: 20px 15px;
    margin-top: 20px;
    margin-bottom: 15px;
    background: rgba(255, 250, 240, 0.6);
    border-radius: 12px;
    border-top: 1px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.digital-footer-text {
    font-size: 11px;
    color: #8B4513;
    margin: 0 0 6px 0;
    font-weight: 500;
    letter-spacing: 0.5px;
    opacity: 0.85;
}

.copyright-text {
    font-size: 10px;
    color: #654321;
    margin: 0;
    font-weight: 400;
    opacity: 0.7;
    letter-spacing: 0.3px;
}

/* Social Icons */
.social-icons {
    display: flex;
    justify-content: center;
    align-items: center;
    gap: 15px;
    margin: 12px 0;
}

.social-icon {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: center;
    width: 36px;
    height: 36px;
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.1);
    border: 1.5px solid rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
    border-radius: 50%;
    color: #8B4513;
    text-decoration: none;
    transition: all 0.3s ease;
    cursor: pointer;
}

.social-icon:hover {
    background: rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.2);
    border-color: #DAA520;
    color: #DAA520;
    transform: translateY(-2px) scale(1.1);
    box-shadow: 0 4px 8px rgba(218, 165, 32, 0.3);
}

.social-icon:active {
    transform: translateY(0) scale(1.05);
}

.social-icon svg {
    width: 18px;
    height: 18px;
    transition: transform 0.3s ease;
}

.social-icon:hover svg {
    transform: scale(1.1);
}

/* Responsive design - works on both mobile and desktop */
@media (min-width: 768px) {
    body {
        background: #F5F5DC;
    }
    
    /* Removed mobile-only popup - website now works on desktop too */
}

/* Animation */
@keyframes fadeIn {
    from {
        opacity: 0;
        transform: translateY(20px);
    }
    to {
        opacity: 1;
        transform: translateY(0);
    }
}

.main-content {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

.couple-names {
    animation: fadeIn 1.2s ease-out;
}

.wedding-details {
    animation: fadeIn 1.4s ease-out;
}

.countdown-section {
    animation: fadeIn 0.8s ease-out;
}

.calendar-section {
    animation: fadeIn 1s ease-out;
}

```


Added social media icons to the digital footer section.

**Features:**
- **Three social icons**: Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn
- **SVG icons** (no external dependencies)
- **Clickable links** that open in new tabs
- **Hover effects**: icons scale up and show a golden glow
- **Design**: circular icons with golden borders matching the theme
- **Accessibility**: proper `aria-label` attributes

**Styling:**
- Icons are centered between the creator text and copyright
- Circular design with subtle background
- Smooth hover animations
- Golden color scheme matching the invitation theme

- **Instagram**: https://www.instagram.com/mrpal___?igsh=MTMxcnUwdjUwNWxzOQ==

Here are ways to save this chat in Cursor:

**Option 1: Copy the conversation**
- Select all messages (Ctrl+A / Cmd+A) and copy (Ctrl+C / Cmd+C)
- Paste into a text file or document

**Option 2: Export (if available)**
- Check the chat panel for an export/save option (menu or icon)
- Some versions allow exporting as markdown or text

**Option 3: Screenshot**
- Take screenshots of the conversation
- Use Windows Snipping Tool (Win+Shift+S) or your preferred tool

**Option 4: Save manually**
- Create a file (e.g., `chat_history.md`) in your project
- Copy and paste the conversation into it

**Option 5: Use Cursor's built-in features**
- Check the chat panel menu (three dots or settings icon) for export/save options
- Some versions auto-save chat history in Cursor's data folder

Since there's no export option, here are practical ways to save the chat:

**Option 1: Copy all messages**
1. Click in the chat panel
2. Press `Ctrl+A` (or `Cmd+A` on Mac) to select all
3. Press `Ctrl+C` (or `Cmd+C`) to copy
4. Create a new file in your project (e.g., `chat_history.md` or `project_notes.txt`)
5. Paste the content there

**Option 2: Create a summary document**
I can generate a markdown summary of what we built, including:
- All features added
- Files modified
- Key changes
- Technical details

You can save it as `PROJECT_SUMMARY.md` in your project folder.

**Option 3: Save important parts**
- Copy specific sections you need
- Save code snippets to separate files
- Take screenshots of important parts

**Option 4: Check Cursor's data folder**
Chat history may be stored locally. On Windows, it's often in:
- `%APPDATA%\Cursor\User\workspaceStorage\` or
- `%APPDATA%\Cursor\logs\`

```markdown
# Wedding Invitation Website - Complete Chat History & Project Documentation

## Project Overview
A beautiful, responsive wedding invitation website for Prithis & Priti's wedding on May 13, 2026. The website features a landing page and a detailed invitation page with multiple interactive sections.

---

## Complete Feature List

### 1. Landing Page (First Page)
- **Ganesh Logo**: Displayed at the top with golden styling
- **Invitation Badge**: "আমন্ত্রণ / INVITATION" badge with gradient background
- **Bride & Groom Combined Logo**: Animated logo box with `bride_grrom_logo.png`
- **Heart Icon**: Animated heart (❤) between logo and names
- **Names Section**: 
  - Bengali calligraphy images: `priti-removebg-preview.png` and `prithis-removebg-preview.png`
  - English names displayed below images
- **Subtitle Text**: "আমাদের বিবাহে আপনাকে আমন্ত্রণ জানাচ্ছি / We invite you to our wedding"
- **View Invitation Button**: Opens the invitation page and starts background music
- **Footer**: "প্রীতি ও পৃথ্বীশের বিবাহ / Prithis & Priti Wedding"

### 2. Invitation Page (Second Page)
- **Header Section**: 
  - Ganesh logo with glow animation
  - "ওঁ শ্রী গণেশায় নমঃ / Om Shri Ganeshaya Namah"
  - "মঙ্গল আমন্ত্রণ / Auspicious Invitation"
  
- **Bride & Groom Images**: Individual logos (`bride_logo.png` and `grrom_logo.png`) with slide-in animations

- **Main Invitation Section**:
  - Decorative top and bottom borders
  - Invitation text in Bengali and English
  - Couple names with parent information
  - Wedding details (date, time, venue)
  - Host information

- **Countdown Timer**: 
  - Days, Hours, Minutes, Seconds until wedding
  - Updates in real-time
  - Golden themed design

- **Calendar Section**: 
  - May 2026 calendar
  - Wedding day highlighted in red
  - Today's date highlighted in gold

- **Map & QR Code Section**:
  - Google Maps location image (`mapped_view.jpeg`)
  - QR code for location (generated dynamically)
  - Clickable to open in Google Maps
  - Responsive layout

- **Our Moments Section**:
  - Timeline design with 4 memory cards
  - Images: `memories_1.png`, `memories_2.png`, `memories_3.png`, `memories_4.png`
  - Each card has:
    - Image with hover zoom effect
    - Date/title in Bengali and English
    - Caption text
  - Vertical timeline with connecting line and dots
  - Staggered fade-in animations

- **RSVP Section**:
  - Form fields:
    - Name (Bengali/English)
    - Number of guests
    - Attendance status
    - Wishes/Blessings message
  - Data stored in localStorage
  - Success message on submission

- **Blessings Section**:
  - Displays all submitted wishes
  - Clear button to remove all blessings
  - Confirmation dialog before clearing
  - Empty state message

- **Contribution Section**:
  - PhonePe QR code (`Phone_pay_qr.jpeg`)
  - UPI ID: `7003167407-2@ibl`
  - Click to copy UPI ID functionality
  - Visual feedback on copy
  - Responsive layout

- **Footer**:
  - Ganesh emoji
  - Couple names
  - Wedding date
  - Note about blessings

- **Digital Footer**:
  - "Digital Invitation Created by @Subrata Pal"
  - Social media icons (Facebook, Instagram, LinkedIn)
  - Copyright notice
  - Clickable social icons that open in new tabs

### 3. Background Features
- **Background Music**: `ReelAudio-43395.mp3` plays automatically when invitation page opens
- **Scroll Navigation**: Scroll up at top of invitation page to return to landing page
- **Form Protection**: Prevents accidental scroll-back during form interactions
- **Translation Disabled**: Browser translation is disabled for the entire page
- **Responsive Design**: Works on both mobile and desktop devices

---

## Technical Implementation

### Files Structure
```
Prithis/
├── index.html          (Main HTML file)
├── style.css           (All styling)
├── script.js           (JavaScript functionality)
└── Assets/
    ├── bride_logo.png
    ├── grrom_logo.png
    ├── bride_grrom_logo.png
    ├── ganesh_logo.png
    ├── priti-removebg-preview.png
    ├── prithis-removebg-preview.png
    ├── palki.png (not currently used)
    ├── memories_1.png
    ├── memories_2.png
    ├── memories_3.png
    ├── memories_4.png
    ├── mapped_view.jpeg
    ├── Phone_pay_qr.jpeg
    ├── ReelAudio-43395.mp3
    └── js/
        └── qrcode.min.js
```

### Key Technologies
- **HTML5**: Semantic structure
- **CSS3**: 
  - Flexbox and Grid layouts
  - Animations and transitions
  - Responsive media queries
  - Custom gradients and shadows
- **JavaScript**:
  - DOM manipulation
  - LocalStorage for data persistence
  - QR code generation (qrcodejs library)
  - Countdown timer
  - Calendar generation
  - Audio playback control
  - Clipboard API for UPI ID copying
- **Google Fonts**: 
  - Noto Sans Bengali (for Bengali text)
  - Playfair Display (for English headings)

### Key Functions in script.js

1. **`openInvitation()`**: 
   - Switches from landing to invitation page
   - Starts countdown and calendar
   - Generates QR code
   - Loads blessings
   - Plays background music

2. **`goBack()`**: 
   - Returns to landing page
   - Pauses and resets music

3. **`startCountdown()`**: 
   - Calculates time until wedding
   - Updates every second
   - Displays in days, hours, minutes, seconds

4. **`generateCalendar()`**: 
   - Creates May 2026 calendar
   - Highlights wedding day (13th) and today

5. **`generateMapQRCode()`**: 
   - Generates QR code for Google Maps location
   - Uses qrcodejs library

6. **`openMapLocation()`**: 
   - Opens Google Maps in new tab

7. **`sendRSVP()`**: 
   - Validates form
   - Stores RSVP in localStorage
   - Adds blessing if provided
   - Shows success message

8. **`addBlessing()`**: 
   - Adds blessing to localStorage
   - Updates display

9. **`displayBlessings()`**: 
   - Loads and displays all blessings
   - Shows/hides clear button

10. **`clearBlessings()`**: 
    - Confirms before clearing
    - Removes all blessings from localSt
```
